title: SemanticTraceEvent
description: One line of a semantic trace NDJSON file (was: TraceEvent). Traces have RAW and NORMALIZED layers; trace.diff consumes NORMALIZED. The CORE event `kind` vocabulary is framework-neutral (user/network/DOM/ARIA/URL/console/domain/settle/focus/perf). ALL framework-internal events — both source-framework (Angular2+) and target-framework (React) internals — collapse into the single neutral kind `framework.event`, whose framework-specific type and payload live in the `frameworkEvent` adapter slot. The diff/normalizer aligns on `semanticKey`, so framework-internal events never leak into parity comparison unless a policy opts in.

t.description: ms since scenario start (informational; normalized diffs ignore absolute time).

kind.description: Neutral event kind. Framework-internal lifecycle events use 'framework.event' and carry detail in frameworkEvent.

payload.description: Kind-specific payload for neutral kinds. Conventions: net.* {method, path, query, status, bodyHash}; domain.event {name, payload}; aria.milestone {snapshotHash, delta}; focus.change {fromRole+name, toRole+name}; settle {reason}.

frameworkEvent.description: Present when kind == 'framework.event'. Captures a framework-internal lifecycle signal. Replaces any hardcoded per-framework event kinds in the core; the type/detail are now adapter-defined, e.g. Angular2+ 'change-detection' / 'zone-task' / 'rxjs-emit' (source) and React 'commit' / 'error-boundary' (target).

adapterId.description: Which adapter's vocabulary `type` belongs to, e.g. 'angular2plus', 'react', 'vue3'.

type.description: Adapter-defined event type. Angular2+ examples: 'change-detection', 'zone-task', 'signal-write', 'effect-run', 'rxjs-emit', 'router-event', 'app-initializer'. React examples: 'commit', 'error-boundary'.

detail.description: Adapter-specific payload for this framework event (e.g. Angular2+ rxjs-emit {stream, valueHash}; React commit {componentId, phase}).

semanticKey.description: Normalizer-assigned stable key used by trace.diff for alignment, e.g. 'net:GET:/api/invoices?status=paid' or 'domain:invoiceFilterChanged'. Framework-neutral by construction. Absent on raw layer.
